title: Cannot set property 'oddFooter' of undefined
author: Gricardov
body:
Hi dear team;
I'm using a browser version of exceljs (https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/exceljs/2.0.1/exceljs.js)
and I'm trying to set a header and footer. Unfortunately, I get this message:

Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot set property 'oddFooter' of undefined

This is my code, same as the documentation:

ws.headerFooter.oddFooter = "Page &P of &N";

Thanks in advance

comments.author: jasonbarrows
